requirement: the same scenario IDs are run for each compared runtime view/model
at least 30 cases per runtime view per model for pilot analysis; larger sample before release calibration
at least one primary component metric has nonzero variance
non-perfect cases are bucketed and reviewed
protocol violations are separated from path-quality mistakes
IR, target manifest, session trace, transcript, and weights hashes are present
repeated seeds/runs show whether results are stable enough to compare
distributions or confidence intervals are reported, not only means
a sample of failed transcripts is manually inspected before changing weights
proposed weight changes are documented in CALIBRATION_DECISION.*
